task: Add a non-executing hosted storage migration contract for the Pro Rust product core: define the Postgres/Redis/tenant/auth/worker-ownership migration plan in existing Rust crates, expose it through a keyless API endpoint, render a compact storage-boundary panel in the graph-first web shell, and synchronize Pro docs/evidence. Do not add database connections, Redis connections, migrations, provider credentials, live provider calls, auth, billing, real workers, OSS runtime changes, or package dependencies.
securityRequirements: Mention auth, secrets, permissions, and sensitive-data handling explicitly.
dependencyRequirements: Mention new or upgraded packages, lockfile changes, and dependency impact explicitly.
performanceRequirements: Mention performance, latency, or load impact in evidence.
understandingRequirements: Explain the main tradeoffs so future maintainers can follow the change.
continuityRequirements: Mention reuse targets and any deliberate continuity break in evidence.
